task1.title: Players of electronic games in South Korea in 2003
task1.instruction: The charts below give information about players of electronic games in South Korea in 2003. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Housing shortages in big cities can cause severe social consequences. Some people think only government action can solve this problem. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
